meaning: n.古代巨鸟,渡渡鸟 <美>旧派的人 <美俚>还不能单独飞行的航校学员
examples: Mary sat up, and through the window she saw a dodo, an unusual dodo, right there in her yard!
"I lived over four hundred years ago," the dodo said.
The Pomellato group is a profitable and growing Italian business with two brands, Pomellato and Dodo.
More than 2, 000 DODO cases sold in just the first day on the market.
